response.overview: In the city of Paris, two striking models, Little Caprice and Catherine Knight, meet during a fashion shoot. The chemistry between them is undeniable, sparking a friendship that quickly blossoms into something deeper. Both free-spirited and adventurous, they find themselves constantly seeking new thrills. One fateful day, the duo concocts a mischievous plan. They secretly procure the apartment key of a renowned, dashing director who has caught their eye. With a sense of playful daring, they raid their wardrobes for their finest lingerie, transforming themselves into tantalizing sirens. The atmosphere is electric with anticipation as they slip into the elegant confines of his opulent apartment. Max is horny and needs a woman so he phones his favourite escort agency and asks them to send over their best girl. He's really looking forward to some top quality pussy, but when Eveline Dellai arrives she makes it clear that she's got other ideas and Max ends up with some high end ass instead.
